summary: Hyunwoo leads his party, consisting of Youngjoon and Yuri, on a mission to locate a hidden instance dungeon to complete a quest against black magicians. After hours of searching the Dark Cave, they discover the laboratory of the Novice Black Magician, Adele, who plans to use an undead army to exact revenge. The party engages Adele and her summon, the Giant Bone Bear, successfully navigating the boss's fear-based crowd control attacks through Yuri's quick reflexes and Hyunwoo's leadership.
key_moments: The party spends seven hours searching the Dark Cave for a hidden instance dungeon.
They discover the laboratory of the Novice Black Magician, Adele, who attempts to fight them using a Giant Bone Bear.
Yuri successfully shields Youngjoon from the boss's 'Fear' crowd control skill, allowing the party to continue their assault.
